proposed_issue.title: [Research Follow-up] Investigate GPU-accelerated DuckDB vector indexing for Streeling
proposed_issue.body:
A recent Second Brain research loop queried for 'GPU-accelerated vector indexing in DuckDB' but the Streeling catalog returned no actionable learnings. We need to evaluate whether the ecosystem should adopt this capability to speed up Registrar queries.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research DuckDB vector extension GPU support.
- [ ] Evaluate applicability to Streeling's Registrar schema.
- [ ] Update Streeling catalog with findings.
